name: print_end_high_z
description: PRINT_END at Z=298 (Z lift should be skipped both ways).
diff_explanation: Round 5 (cross-macro coupling refactor) extracted the TP_OUT/TP_PUT probing-gate flags from G30/G31/PG28 into a dedicated _PROBE_GATE state container. PRINT_END calls TP_PUT, so the SET_GCODE_VARIABLE target renames from MACRO=G30/G31/PG28 (with VARIABLE=k/a/p) to MACRO=_PROBE_GATE (with VARIABLE=g30_enabled/g31_enabled/pg28_enabled). The values written (1 = enabled) are identical; only the storage location moved. Zero motion or heater/fan behavior change.
